title: Geography of Mauritius
content: Mauritius is an island of Africa's southeast coast located in the Indian Ocean, east of Madagascar. It is geologically located within the Somali plate. Statistics. Area (includes Agaléga, Cargados Carajos (Saint Brandon), and Rodrigues): <br "total:" 2,011 km2 <br "land:" 2,030 km2 <br "water:" 10 km2 <br "note:" includes Agalega Islands, Cargados Carajos Shoais (Saint Brandon), and Rodrigues.
